summary: Iteration 48 - LoginPage and RegisterPage responsive testing complete. Verified mobile-first design on both pages with mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px) viewports. All responsive features working correctly. Regression test for login flow (test@example.com / password123) and cart navigation passed successfully.

issues: Translation keys showing instead of translated text: 'checkout.emailVerified', 'checkout.continueShopping', 'header.searchPlaceholder', 'header.stores'

action_items: FIX i18n (from iteration 47): Translation keys showing instead of translated text - 'checkout.emailVerified', 'checkout.continueShopping', 'header.searchPlaceholder', 'header.stores'
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js: Mobile-first responsive design correctly implemented with md: breakpoint classes
LoginPage.js: Mobile header with ArrowLeft back button (data-testid='mobile-back-btn') working
LoginPage.js: Desktop header wrapped in 'hidden md:block' - correctly hidden on mobile
LoginPage.js: Inputs have h-12 md:h-10 for touch-friendly mobile experience
LoginPage.js: Mail and Lock icons have 'md:hidden' class - visible only on mobile
LoginPage.js: Footer wrapped in 'hidden md:block' - correctly hidden on mobile
RegisterPage.js: Mobile-first responsive design correctly implemented
RegisterPage.js: Role selector uses User, Store, Sparkles icons from lucide-react
RegisterPage.js: Role descriptions have 'hidden md:block' - visible only on desktop
RegisterPage.js: Consent section (data-testid='consent-section') properly visible on mobile
RegisterPage.js: All inputs have h-12 md:h-10 for responsive sizing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified LoginPage and RegisterPage responsive design. Key findings: 1) Both pages have mobile-first design with simplified headers on mobile (back button + title). 2) Desktop shows full header with navigation. 3) Inputs are larger on mobile (h-12) for touch-friendly experience. 4) Icons in inputs visible only on mobile. 5) Footer hidden on mobile for both pages. 6) Role selector on RegisterPage shows icons on both viewports but descriptions only on desktop. 7) Login flow works correctly with test@example.com / password123. 8) Cart navigation after login works. 9) i18n translation key issues persist from iteration 47.

mobile_390px.header: WORKING - Mobile header with back button and 'Login' title
mobile_390px.inputs: WORKING - h-12 height, pl-10 for icon space
mobile_390px.icons: WORKING - Mail and Lock icons visible

desktop_1920px.header: WORKING - Full desktop header with navigation
desktop_1920px.inputs: WORKING - md:h-10 height, md:pl-3 (no icon space)

mobile_390px.header: WORKING - Mobile header with back button and role-based title
mobile_390px.role_selector: WORKING - 3-column grid with icons (User, Store, Sparkles)
mobile_390px.inputs: WORKING - h-12 height for touch-friendly experience

desktop_1920px.role_selector: WORKING - 3-column grid with icons and descriptions
desktop_1920px.consent_section: WORKING - Visible with full disclosure option

regression_tests.cart_navigation: PASS - /cart loads correctly after login with cart items
